forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KW263EW64TVAPZD7CYCBMNVV
+- 01KW264DJC1A7J6M54MZC0E9S5
+- 01KW267YT5YS3CXDCWE1YG9JR0
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: bb80
+project: expect
+title: 'expect expectation create: agent authors specs (doctor loop) + sources'
+---
+## What
+The authoring op a coding agent drives to capture intent at the moment it's expressed. Per `ideas/expect.md` §"expect expectation create" and §"Errors that teach".
+
+- New `crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/create.rs` (+ tools op):
+  - `create(source, intent_text) -> drafted spec(s)`: read the intent-bearing artifact, draft one or more `*.expect.md` files with explicit intent + bounded (~3-5) criteria, loop each through `doctor` until every field is green (the agent patches exactly the red fields using the structured per-field diagnostics — it can't emit an invalid spec), record a candidate observation, and leave the result **unapproved** (ledger state `new`) for a human to confirm.
+  - Hand the agent the RESOLVED frontmatter schema (closed enums + live `model:` set) and the authoring rules: intent-is-mandatory, keep-criteria-bounded, state-the-right-reason (the 401-vs-200 defense), prefer invariants over literals.
+  - Sources (all feed one draft→doctor→confirm pipeline): `--from-chat` (default interactive), `--from-task <id>` (kanban task acceptance criteria, link back as provenance only), `--from-spec <path>` (mine should/must/example), `--from-session` (capture a hand-verified run), and a bare intent string.
+- Wire `expectation create` op in `tools/expect/mod.rs`; it uses the agent seam (driving agent) to author. Leaves file + unapproved candidate observation.
+- (Authoring SKILL that proactively offers capture mid-conversation is a separate skill task; this is the tool it calls.)
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `expect expectation create "<intent>"` drafts a `*.expect.md`, loops it through doctor until all fields are Ok, and leaves it unapproved (`new`).
+- [ ] The agent is handed the resolved schema incl. the live model set; a draft can never be left in a doctor-Error state.
+- [ ] `--from-task <id>` drafts from a kanban task's criteria and records task provenance (tag/comment) without coupling the spec to the task lifecycle.
+- [ ] `--from-spec`/`--from-session`/`--from-chat` route through the same pipeline.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Integration test with a stub authoring agent: from an intent string, produces a doctor-green spec left in `new` state with a candidate observation.
+- [ ] Test the doctor-repair loop: a deliberately-bad first draft is corrected to green.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-expect create` passes.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd`. Stub the authoring agent for determinism.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,6 +1,11 @@
 ---
 assignees:
 - claude-code
+comments:
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kw439v335dx88vqkjmy4t35n
+  text: 'Picked up. Research done: mapped doctor::diagnose (green-loop source of truth), drive::GoalDriver/AcpGoalDriver (single-use-per-session — repair loop must mint a fresh driver per author() call), observe::write_received (candidate observation), ledger state `new` = golden absent + received present (ApprovalStatus::New). Design: pure engine create.rs with a `SpecAuthor` trait (stub in tests), `create()` draft→doctor(error-elimination)→repair loop bounded by MAX_REPAIR_ITERATIONS, safe-join spec path (no traversal, must end .expect.md), writes spec + candidate received observation (authoring trajectory, empty checkpoints, no golden ⇒ `new`), records Provenance. render_schema reuses doctor''s enum value lists (pub(crate)) so schema asserts against same source of truth. Tool layer: GoalDriver-backed SpecAuthor minting a fresh AcpGoalDriver per call via AgentFactory; wire `expectation create` op. TDD with stub author.'
+  timestamp: 2026-06-27T08:31:53.955058+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KW263EW64TVAPZD7CYCBMNVV
 - 01KW264DJC1A7J6M54MZC0E9S5

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -6,6 +6,21 @@
   id: 01kw439v335dx88vqkjmy4t35n
   text: 'Picked up. Research done: mapped doctor::diagnose (green-loop source of truth), drive::GoalDriver/AcpGoalDriver (single-use-per-session — repair loop must mint a fresh driver per author() call), observe::write_received (candidate observation), ledger state `new` = golden absent + received present (ApprovalStatus::New). Design: pure engine create.rs with a `SpecAuthor` trait (stub in tests), `create()` draft→doctor(error-elimination)→repair loop bounded by MAX_REPAIR_ITERATIONS, safe-join spec path (no traversal, must end .expect.md), writes spec + candidate received observation (authoring trajectory, empty checkpoints, no golden ⇒ `new`), records Provenance. render_schema reuses doctor''s enum value lists (pub(crate)) so schema asserts against same source of truth. Tool layer: GoalDriver-backed SpecAuthor minting a fresh AcpGoalDriver per call via AgentFactory; wire `expectation create` op. TDD with stub author.'
   timestamp: 2026-06-27T08:31:53.955058+00:00
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kw44serqhefdamnthkdr4yje
+  text: |-
+    Implemented and green in `doing`.
+
+    Engine (crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/create.rs, NEW): `SpecAuthor` trait (authoring agent seam, mirrors GoalDriver), `create()` runs the draft→doctor→repair green-loop (error-elimination, bounded by MAX_REPAIR_ITERATIONS=5 — a non-converging draft errors having written NOTHING, so a spec is never left in a doctor-Error state), safe-joins the agent-chosen path (no traversal, must be *.expect.md), writes the spec + a candidate received observation (authoring trajectory, empty checkpoints), leaves ledger state New (no golden). `render_schema` hands the agent the resolved schema (closed enums reused from doctor as the single source of truth + live model set) + authoring rules; `render_authoring_goal`/`parse_draft` are the prompt/JSON contract. `CreateSource` (Intent/Chat/Task/Spec/Session) + `Provenance`. doctor.rs: enum value lists + KNOWN/REQUIRED keys made pub(crate) for reuse.
+
+    Tool (crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/expect/): expect_op.rs adds `AgentSpecAuthor` (mints a FRESH AcpGoalDriver per author() call since it is single-use) + `run_create_request` (pipeline gate + spawn_blocking current-thread runtime). mod.rs wires the `create expectation` op (ExpectTool gains optional AgentFactory + with_agent_factory + register_expect_tool_with_factory), resolves the source (intent / from_task via kanban GetTask / from_spec via safe-joined file read / from_session / from_chat), and records a best-effort kanban provenance comment for from_task.
+
+    TDD: stub `SpecAuthor` covers intent→green/new+candidate-obs, the doctor-repair loop (bad first draft → green), from-task criteria+provenance, the never-green guard (writes nothing), path traversal, schema/goal/parse units. Tool tests use a scripted AgentFactory end-to-end (intent, from_task with a real kanban board asserting the provenance comment, from_spec routing + traversal rejection, requires-factory error).
+
+    Adversarial double-check returned REVISE with two findings, both addressed: (1) added the from_task/from_spec tool-layer tests (real kanban board + provenance comment); (2) clarified in docs that create assumes a fresh identity and reports state=New rather than re-deriving from the ledger.
+
+    Verification (all green): `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-expect -p swissarmyhammer-tools -E 'test(create) or test(expect)'` = 123 passed; `cargo check --workspace` ok; `cargo fmt` applied; `cargo clippy -p swissarmyhammer-expect -p swissarmyhammer-tools -- -D warnings` clean. Left in `doing` for /review (no commit, no column move).
+  timestamp: 2026-06-27T08:57:54.199384+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KW263EW64TVAPZD7CYCBMNVV
 - 01KW264DJC1A7J6M54MZC0E9S5
